name: AI Core
description: Shared Anthropic Claude connection + context resolver for the ai_* widget family. Set your Anthropic API key once here and every ai widget uses it. Resolves placeholders like {weather.now.temp_c}, {todo.count}, {calendar.next.title}, {ha.entity.<entity_id>.state}, {time.day_of_week} against the live state of other widget cores. No cell of its own.

settings.name: api_key
settings.label: Anthropic API key
settings.help: Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/. Stored locally; only sent to api.anthropic.com when an ai_* widget renders. Claude Haiku 4.5 is the default model (~$0.00025 per brief, ~$0.18/month at hourly refresh).
